cards.front: What is Commission in Database Management System
cards.back: A commission is a database control mechanism where a user can grant a special access permission to perform certain actions on data

cards.front: What type of Commission in Database Management System
cards.back: A grant commission, a revocation commission, or a delegated commission

cards.front: What is Grant Commission in Database Management System
cards.back: A grant commission is a commission granted to a user to perform certain actions on data

cards.front: What is Delegated Commission in Database Management System
cards.back: A delegated commission is a commission granted to a user to perform certain actions on data on behalf of another user

cards.front: What is Revocation Commission in Database Management System
cards.back: A revocation commission is a commission revoked from a user to prevent them from performing certain actions on data
